programs.title: All New Love It Or List It Australia
programs.desc: Will wants a larger kitchen and open space, but Katie loves their current home. With mum Kyoko having the final say, it's head versus heart when the family clash.

programs.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programs.desc: The Digi Diggers need to explore new ground after mining opal too brittle to sell. The Bushmen find their new claim has been dug out by opal thieves.

programs.title: Vanderpump Rules
programs.desc: Lisa gives Marcus an opportunity to DJ a premiere party at SUR. Shayne dates two girls at the same time. Audrey tells Angelica about Chris and Jason's other job, which leads to explosive consequences.

programs.title: Caught!
programs.desc: From stealing gators to eating cheesecake naked in a swamp, the wildly unpredictable Florida Man has been caught on tape in his bizarre habitat!
